nasb.text: Now these are the records of the generations of Terah. Terah became the father of Abram, Nahor and Haran; and Haran became the father of Lot.

esv.text: Now these are the generations of Terah. Terah fathered Abram, Nahor, and Haran; and Haran fathered Lot.

cnv.text: 以下是他拉的後代：他拉生亞伯蘭、拿鶴和哈蘭；哈蘭生羅得。

ccb.text: 以下是他拉的后代。 他拉生亚伯兰、拿鹤和哈兰，哈兰生罗得。

csbs.text: 以下是塔勒的谱系：塔勒生了亚伯兰、拿鹤、哈兰；哈兰生了罗得。
